ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the forum was created */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who moderates the forum */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the forum (e.g., family support, parenting) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum where the topic is posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the topic */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the topic was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the topic was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the topic has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the topic has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the topic */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Is the topic sticky? */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Is the topic locked? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the reply is posted to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the reply was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the reply was last updated */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Has the reply been edited? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website or blog URL of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "favorite_topics" TEXT /* Favorite topics of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is subscribed */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum the user is subscribed to */,
  "subscribed_at" TEXT /* Date the user subscribed to the forum */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the subscription active? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_subscriptions_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic that was viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the topic */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Date the topic was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_views_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the topic */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Date the topic was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_likes_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reply_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the reply */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Date the reply was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reply_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reply_likes_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, reply, like, view) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity (e.g., topic ID, reply ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who raised the flag */,
  "flagged_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic or reply that was flagged */,
  "flagged_type" TEXT /* Type of the flagged item (e.g., topic, reply) */,
  "flagged_at" TEXT /* Date the flag was raised */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for raising the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., edit, delete, move) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., topic ID, reply ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_tags_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
